question: Frank was reading through his favorite book. The book had 41 chapters, each with the same number of pages. It has a total of 450 pages. It took Frank 30 days to finish the book. How many pages did he read per day?
Jesse's room is 19 feet wide and 20 feet long. How much longer is her room than it is wide?
Frank was reading through some books. Each book had 249 pages and it took Frank 3 days to finish each book. How many pages did he read per day?

Paul got a box of 601 crayons and 406 erasers for his birthday. At the end of the school year he only had 336 crayons left while not having lost a single eraser. How many more erasers than crayons did he have left?
The ring toss game at the carnival made 120 dollars in the first 20 days and 66 dollars in the remaining 16 days. How much did they make per day in the first 20 days at the carnival?
Mary is baking a cake. The recipe calls for 5 cups of sugar and 14 cups of flour. She already put in 11 cups of flour. How many more cups of sugar than cups of flour does she need to add now?
Emily is making bead necklaces for her 44 friends. She made 26 necklaces and each necklace takes 2 beads. How many beads did Emily have?
Melissa scored a total of 21 points playing some games. Is she scored 7 points in each game. How many games did she play?
